articles.author: Jon Gambrell
articles.title: Expansion of US strikes on Iran leads to more retaliation across the Gulf - AP News
articles.description: The United States has conducted a new round of airstrikes targeting Iran after announcing the death of another American service member. Iran has responded Monday by launching an attack targeting Bahrain, the home of the U.S. Navy’s 5th Fleet. Even as the U.S.…
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) The United States bombarded Iran again on Monday after announcing the death of another American service member, and Iran retaliated with attacks on American allies Ku… [+6017 chars]

articles.title: Trump is slipping into an Iran quagmire - Financial Times
articles.description: America cannot achieve its aims by negotiation. So regime change is back on the agenda
